reviews.review_title: This game is amazing. MUST BUY!
reviews.review_description: This game is so cheap for the quality. I bought this and didn't expect much from it, especially because it is £3.99 but what I found was an absolute gem of a game. Lost of modes and customisation options and bots that actually feel realistic and not boring. The only minor criticism I have for the game is that when playing online there is no-one to play against. But I think that that is just more of a reason to buy this game and keep it alive.i hope this review brings you to buying this game and if you've already bought it I hope you enjoy and GO ONLINE PLZ😄😅

I do like this, and it's fun to play. However I do wish there were different environments to play in. I find the black dark location quite depressing and makes me less likely to want to play it. It will be fab if it could be played in sort of an open real world environment with blue skies etc. also I'd like it if you could play against a human avatar as opposed to a robot
It’s so much fun even on single mode! But I do hope more people will play so we can play the online game mode with different players in the future.

I'm enjoying this game and I like the concept of it. 

In someone that has tried nearly all the sports VR games, to name a few: 
Walkabout mini golf
Golf+
Home Sports
Thrill of the fight 2
Miracle pool
Eleven. Table tennis

So I clearly have experience in this area.

I would like to give a shout out to the Development team as I sincerely hope they can build upon this concept and include new features to make it like another standout game like Eleven Table Tennis.

reviews.review_title: Somethings missing to get me hooked.
reviews.review_description:
REVIEW 28.2.25.
I’ve played this game for under forty minutes. I love racket  games and have quite a few. I’d normally start this sort of game and continue playing for well over an hour. The first time I loaded it up I quite enjoyed checking it out as it’s an original idea which is very well executed. It seemed like it would be great fun and I played for around 25 minutes or so. I then tried again earlier today and couldn’t get an online match. So I tried some mini games. I didn’t find any of them that enjoyable. I can’t quite put my finger what the issue is with Spinball. It should be fun, but a lack of space doesn’t help. Although the setup shows quite a small area, to actually play anything passed medium difficulty versus the AI bot requires a lot more space. I’d say maybe over four metres squared or even more if hitting the ball harder. 

POSSIBLE IMPROVEMENTS 
If each player had a side like squash, tennis, table tennis, badminton or racket ball, that could possibly work. Also whoever serves has a massive advantage too and can hit the ball directly at you and it’s almost impossible to get. Having to cover 360 degrees in such a small space doesn’t work for me. Maybe if it was a bigger area and four players had their own quarter of the court or areas to cover that could work. I am really not sure. 

CONCLUSION
Maybe I’m not doing the game enough justice and haven’t given it enough time, but it doesn’t seem that fun. Even in early access there has got to be a carrot big enough to want to play more, I just can’t find that carrot I’m sorry to say. Something’s missing to me at least. I’ll check back and see how it progresses, but for now I think it’s a refund I’m afraid.
This game is so much fun

reviews.review_title: Good game but has some problems
reviews.review_description: This game is fun and all its just I can find people to play with🙁

🎾 This Spinball game is an absolute blast, blending Mixed Reality with a virtual cage that keeps the action intense and immersive. It’s especially fun as a 2-player game when you’re in the same space, making for competitive and energetic matches.

The gameplay is super accurate and engaging, and when the AI is on point, it turns into a real workout! Mastering the mechanics, like bouncing the ball off walls and playing low shots, adds a layer of strategy that keeps things exciting.

It’s fast, fun, and addictive—a must-try for anyone looking for a fresh VR experience. Fun, fun, fun!

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (5/5)

This game is whack and boring. The training is goofy and the training voice is annoying. 
And there must be a glitch because I was within the parameters to receive a refund but the app said I was not eligible for a refund.
Nice game

I went into this thinking it would be kinda lame but it’s actually quite fun, I haven’t played much but it got me hooked fast, downside right now is that there aren’t a lot of players, but once there is a player base this will be a great game to play for fun. Another thing is that it can be physically demanding, lunging around trying to get the ball was really fun.

developer_response.body:
We're so glad Spinball surprised you in the best way! Sometimes games can seem a little different from the outside, but we’re thrilled that it hooked you quickly. Building a player base is definitely on our radar, and your support is a big part of helping make that happen.

In the meantime, come join our growing Discord community! You can find new players to match up with and chat about strategies to get those quick lunges just right. Here’s the link: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord. Thanks for giving it a try—and for the awesome feedback!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on vr rn
reviews.review_description: Spin ball is a extremely fun and addicting vr game. It’s a super unique game that i would recommend to anybody who likes tennis, padel or just want to try out something new and fun. It’s even more fun when playing with a friend. It does take a little while to get used to but it is so worth it. 10/10 recommended for everyone!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the amazing review! 🙌 We're thrilled to hear Spinball’s hitting the mark as one of your top VR games! We love that it brings out the best of tennis and padel but with that unique Spinball twist—and yes, playing with friends just adds to the excitement!

If you're looking for more players to match up with or tips on mastering those tricky shots, jump into our Discord community! Here’s the invite: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord. We're so glad you're enjoying it, and we’ll keep working to make Spinball even better. 10/10, right back at ya! 🥳

reviews.review_description:
Spinball VR for Meta Quest is a dynamic and fast-paced VR game that blends the mechanics of platforming and ball-rolling into an exciting experience. Players take control of a spinning ball, navigating through a variety of obstacle courses and environments. The game’s smooth physics and tight controls make it fun and challenging as you zoom through levels, avoiding hazards and solving puzzles.

Visually, Spinball VR is vibrant, with distinct environments that keep the gameplay fresh and engaging. The game’s difficulty ramps up progressively, offering a great balance of challenge without feeling overwhelming. It’s perfect for quick sessions, but the addictive gameplay might keep you hooked for longer.

For Meta Quest users, the VR integration works seamlessly, and the immersive environments add to the fun. Overall, Spinball VR is an exciting and rewarding game, ideal for those who enjoy skill-based, fast-paced action with a unique twist in VR.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your fantastic five-star review! 🌟 We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying Spinball VR and that you appreciate the blend of platforming and ball-rolling mechanics. It’s great to know our smooth physics and tight controls are enhancing your experience as you navigate through the various obstacle courses!

We’re especially glad you find the visuals vibrant and engaging, and we aim to keep the gameplay fresh with progressively challenging levels. It’s wonderful to hear that Spinball VR fits both quick sessions and longer gaming marathons—striking that balance is something we strive for!

Your recognition of the seamless VR integration for Meta Quest users is much appreciated, as we aim to create immersive environments that enhance the fun. If you're looking to connect with other players or stay updated on what’s next for Spinball, come join us in our Spinball Discord community! You can find it here: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord.

Thanks again for your support and for sharing your thoughts—see you on the field! 🎾🏆

reviews.review_description:
Its all about Speed, positioning, precision and Ball control. 

Its also nice that its easy to get started, but hard to master it. 

If you want to combine a Cardio workout with fun, you need to get Spinball!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review! 🙌 We're glad you're enjoying the fast-paced, competitive action of Spinball. It’s definitely a blend of speed, precision, and skill—all while giving you a fantastic cardio workout! 🏃‍♂️💨 It’s awesome to hear you’re having fun mastering the game. If you ever want to connect with others and level up your skills, hop into our Discord: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord. See you on the field! 🎾🔥

reviews.review_description: A really good use of ar and really fun to play

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the shoutout! We're thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying Spinball and appreciate the use of AR in the game! 🎉 Your feedback means a lot to us.

If you’re looking to connect with other players or share your experiences, be sure to join our Discord community: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord. We’d love to see you there!

See you on the field! 🚀💥

reviews.review_title: It’s something else… gotta try it!
reviews.review_description:
This is one of these games that creates their own category. not your usual racket game but something completely different that moves you around the room. 
I love the game mechanics. On one hand it feels realistic, on the other it feels like an arcade game played in space. 
Another great feature is the AI assistant that reminds you of the rules and how to improve your skills. Wish this was a feature in eleven as well :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the amazing review! We’re thrilled to hear you find Spinball so unique and engaging! It’s great that you’re enjoying the blend of realism and arcade fun—it’s exactly what we aimed for. The AI assistant is designed to enhance your experience and help you sharpen your skills, so we’re glad it’s making a positive impact!

If you’re looking to connect with other players or stay updated on new features, be sure to join our Discord community: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord.

See you on the field!

reviews.review_description:
I’m a big fan of VR sports games especially when they are easy to pick up but hard to master. 

Spinball is exactly that, a fresh take on a racket sport that is super easy to understand but highly competitive. It’s really fun playing against mates and swinging a racket in mixed reality is perfect, you are not in danger of hitting anything in your house since you can see your real life play space. 

A must buy if you like racket sports and mixed reality games.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the awesome review! 🎉 We're delighted to hear that Spinball hits the mark as a fun, easy-to-pick-up yet challenging game. It’s great to know you’re enjoying the mixed reality aspect and playing against friends—nothing beats that competitive spirit!

If you’re looking to connect with more players and share your experiences, don’t forget to join our Discord community: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord.

We can’t wait to see you on the field! 🏆🎾

reviews.review_description: Game is great it has a full on traning centre that lets you improve your skills. Community is really friendly and can teach you some really cool tricks.

developer_response.body:
We're glad to hear you’re having a great time with Spinball! 🎉 The training center is designed to help players hone their skills, and it's awesome to know you're finding it useful. Plus, our community is always here to support and share some tricks and tactics!

If you haven’t already, join us on Discord to connect with other players and continue improving your game: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord.

See you on the field! 🚀💪

reviews.review_title: one of the best MR sport games currently
reviews.review_description:
this game is perfect for mixed reality and is incredibly fun.
The game is not about hitting the ball as hard as possible, but about making it as difficult as possible for the opponent to get the ball. This makes you sweat a lot when you have strong opponents.

Despite potential in the form of more online players and nicer skins, I give the game 5 stars because of the brilliant basic idea and perfect integration of MR

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the 5-star review! 🌟 We're thrilled that Spinball's unique strategy-based gameplay has resonated with you—and yes, playing against strong opponents really does keep you on your toes! 🏃‍♂️💦 We're continuously working on adding more content, and with your feedback, we know exactly where to focus next.

If you're looking to connect with other players, challenge top competitors, or share ideas, join us on Discord: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord. We’d love to see you there and keep the fun going! 🚀

reviews.review_title: Makes you feel like REALLY exercising
reviews.review_description:
This is an Amazing MR game.. it’s the first game ever that really makes me feel like I’m practicing a real sport, and sweating, and feeling that nice sensation of doing an aerobic. That game itself has a lot of features for you to practice alone, and the offline gameplay with bots it’s already really fun.

I haven’t played the online yet, might do this when I feel that I’m better about the game.

The game still has some to improve, there is some bugs and lags that happens sometimes while in a match, but kwnoing that this is still in early access makes me think that this issues will be gone when the game releases.

Congrats to the game designers and developers to make a really great idea happens

developer_response.body:
Thank you for such an energizing review! 🌟 

We’re thrilled to hear that Spinball is giving you that real-sport workout vibe—sweat and all! 🏃‍♂️💦 It’s awesome that you’re enjoying the offline modes; jumping into multiplayer when you’re ready will add another level of fun.

As for the bugs and lags, we truly appreciate your understanding—it’s all part of the early access journey, and your feedback is helping us improve every day! If you’d like to share more thoughts or report anything specific, join our community on Discord: https://bit.ly/spinball-discord. It’s the perfect place to connect with other players and stay updated on the latest improvements.

Thanks again, and see you on the field! 🔥
